title: The Emerald Lakes of New Zealand

scenes.text: These lakes glow with an unreal emerald hue.
This is the Emerald Lakes, located in Tongariro National Park, North Island.
The vibrant color comes from minerals and sulfur, creating a striking contrast.
The lakes are formed from volcanic activity.
scenes.label: VOLCANIC ORIGINS

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Emerald Lakes, Tongariro National Park - New Zealand. These lakes are a mesmerizing blend of minerals that create vibrant hues. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
